description: Use this API to return area totals. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr, cmpval = ardat(iar, string)

parameters.name: string
parameters.description: String indicating the area total desired. (input).

string.description: Total area load by bus area assignment (net of load plus in-service distributed generation on load feeder).
Total area load by load area assignment.
Total distributed generation on load feeder by bus area assignment.
Total distributed generation on load feeder by load area assignment.
Total area losses; I**2 * (R + jX) for ac branches with non-metered end in the area.
Magnetizing admittance powers for transformers with winding 1 bus in the area.
Powers flowing into line shunts of non-transformer branches with non-metered end in the area.
Powers flowing from line charging of non-transformer branches with non-metered end in the area.
Total area induction machine powers by bus area assignment.
Total area induction machine powers by machine area assignment.
Total area induction generator powers by bus area assignment.
Total area induction generator powers by machine area assignment.
Total area induction motor powers by bus area assignment.
Total area induction motor powers by machine area assignment.

error_codes.description: Area number < 0 or > largest allowable area number; ‘P’ and ‘Q’ or ‘CMPVAL’ unchanged.

No in-service buses with in-service loads (for ‘LOAD’), no in-service loads (for ‘LOADLD’), no type 2 or type 3 buses (for ‘GEN’), no branches (for ‘LOSS’), or no ties (for ‘INT’) in area; ‘P’ and ‘Q’ or ‘CMPVAL’ unchanged.
Area not found; ‘P’ and ‘Q’ or ‘CMPVAL’ unchanged.
